meta.title: Gouder Haithem — Software Engineer in Algeria
meta.description: Gouder Haithem is a software engineer in Algiers, Algeria building high-performance websites, custom CRM, and ERP systems. Available for remote and local projects.
meta.ogDescription: Gouder Haithem is a software engineer in Algiers, Algeria building high-performance websites, custom CRM, and ERP systems.
meta.twitterDescription: Software engineer in Algiers building websites, CRM, and ERP systems.

footer.big: Built in a terminal, finished by hand.

home.h1: Gouder Haithem — Software Engineer in Algeria

hero.role: Software Engineer. Building websites, CRMs, and ERP systems that feel inevitable — considered interfaces on top of solid foundations.

about.title:
Four years of considered

software work.
about.lead1: I'm a software engineer from Algiers building the products that companies actually run on — marketing sites, internal CRMs, and full ERP platforms.
about.lead2: Most of my work lives in a terminal. The rest tries very hard to look like it doesn't, which is where this site comes in.

services.title: What I build.
services.note: Engagements run 4–12 weeks. Fixed scope, weekly demos, source on day one.

work.title: Three things I stand behind.
work.p1meta: Distributed analytical engine for a 4 PB warehouse. Pushes predicates into Parquet at the SSD level; rewrites plans across a 64-node cluster.
work.p2meta: A multiplayer design surface — vector, raster, and 3D primitives sharing one Yjs document. WebGL render pipeline that holds 60 fps with 10k objects on a MacBook Air.
work.p3meta: Pluggable transformer for low-code platforms. AST-level optimizations and a WASM runtime that pre-warms in 8 ms. Open source, used in production by three Series B startups.

skills.title: The constellation.
skills.para: Each node is a tool I reach for without thinking. Connections mark the combinations I actually ship in production — not the résumé kind.

contact.sub: I take on a few projects a quarter — web platforms, CRM, and ERP work, occasionally a more ambitious interface. Tell me what you're building.

contactForm.messagePlaceholder: What are you building, and what's the deadline?

contactPage.metaDescription: Start a project with Gouder Haithem — web platforms, CRM, and ERP work. Reply within 12 hours, NDA on request.

servicesPage.metaDescription: Software engineering services by Gouder Haithem — websites and web apps, CRM and ERP platforms, APIs and integrations, performance and SEO audits, and ongoing support.
servicesPage.title: What I build.
servicesPage.intro: From a single marketing site to a full ERP rollout. Engagements run 4–12 weeks with fixed scope, weekly demos, and source on day one.
servicesPage.step1Body: A short discovery call, then a fixed scope with clear deliverables and a timeline — no open-ended surprises.
servicesPage.step2Body: Weekly demos and source on day one. You see progress every week and own the code from the start.
servicesPage.step3Body: Deployment, monitoring, and handover docs. The work goes live on infrastructure you control.
servicesPage.step4Body: Optional ongoing care — updates, fixes, and new features with defined response times.

blogPage.metaDescription: Writing on software engineering by Gouder Haithem — databases, performance, CRM and ERP architecture, and frontend craft.
blogPage.title: Notes on building software.
blogPage.intro: Essays on the engineering and product decisions behind the work — databases, performance, and the systems that quietly run businesses.
blogPage.empty: No posts yet. Check back soon.
